reviews.author: Ahmad R.
reviews.text: The roast lamb ribs are legendary. Deep-fried, deeply spiced, and they disappear in minutes. Hidden between car workshops but absolutely worth the trip. Most of the diners here are Chinese Muslims — that's how you know it's the real thing.

reviews.author: Sarah L.
reviews.text: Finally, authentic halal Xinjiang cuisine in KL! The dumplings with chili oil are made with love, and the hawthorn plum drink is unlike anything else. Newly renovated interior looks great too.

reviews.author: Wei Ming
reviews.text: Been coming here since 2016. The spiced beef and hand-pulled noodles are my go-to order. No flashy signage, just incredible food. The regulars know what's up.
